title: Business Operation Internship – LMS System
shortDescription: Custom LMS development and automation using Frappe and APIs.
detailedDescription: Worked at Cloudraft Technologies Pvt. Ltd., contributing to the development and deployment of a custom LMS built with the Frappe framework and Python. Designed and structured multiple training courses for Charcoal Eats outlets, enabling efficient progress tracking for a large number of users. Automated critical workflows such as password resets using GitHub Actions and REST APIs, significantly reducing manual operational overhead. Managed large-scale content uploads including SOP documents and streamlined onboarding by integrating Frappe APIs, improving overall system efficiency and usability.
architectureNotes: LMS built on Frappe framework with API-driven automation for user management and workflows. Focus on operational efficiency and scalable content delivery.

title: Frontend Development Internship – Esports Platform
shortDescription: Scalable and responsive UI for an Esports platform.
detailedDescription: Worked at Assemble, developing a full-featured Esports platform UI using React and JavaScript. Built and structured multiple pages to support user onboarding and engagement flows. Developed a reusable component system using React and Tailwind CSS, ensuring modularity and scalability for future feature expansion. Designed responsive layouts using CSS Flexbox and Grid, delivering consistent performance and user experience across all device types.
architectureNotes: Component-driven frontend architecture with reusable UI system. Emphasis on responsive design and scalable layout structuring.

title: Full Stack Development Internship – Educational Platform
shortDescription: Full-stack learning platform with quizzes and leaderboard system.
detailedDescription: Interned at IIT Ropar, contributing to the development of a scalable educational platform using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Engineered full-stack features across multiple courses, supporting high concurrent student activity. Built a quiz delivery and progress tracking system to enable structured assessments and performance monitoring. Designed and optimized PostgreSQL database schemas, including a leaderboard system to rank users across courses. Collaborated in an agile environment, working across frontend and backend to improve system performance, scalability, and user experience.
architectureNotes: Full-stack architecture with REST APIs and relational database design. Includes quiz engine, progress tracking, and leaderboard system with scalable data handling.
